title: Kaigaku katana from anime Demon slayer
description: Resource pack makes it possible to replace any sword with a Kaigaku katana from the anime Demon Slayer by renaming
body: OptiFine required! ( Rename Any sword to "Kaigaku katana" to use it. )   For support, download this resource pack from my website: [kaigaku_katana.zip](https://mineanimecreations.com/resource-pack/kaigaku_katana.zip) Discord server: discord.gg/z86yJcAZKc. Also check out my other packs: https://modrinth.com/user/MineAnimeCreations Resource pack makes it possible to replace any sword with a Kaigaku katana from the anime Demon Slayer by renaming
